source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 重庆山体崩塌救援面临三大困难
topics.official_english: Rescue Efforts for Chongqing Landslide Face Three Major Challenges
topics.why_hot: Natural disaster rescue updates attract public concern for safety and emergency response.
topics.share_angle: Explain the rescue challenges and how authorities are responding.

topics.chinese_topic: 微信又出新功能：已经玩嗨了
topics.official_english: WeChat Launches New Feature: Users Are Excited
topics.why_hot: WeChat updates often go viral due to its massive user base and daily utility.
topics.share_angle: Showcase the new feature and discuss its potential impact on social interaction.

topics.chinese_topic: 这场大会让上海变成“未来城”
topics.official_english: Shanghai Transforms into 'Future City' with Major Conference
topics.why_hot: Tech or innovation conferences in Shanghai draw global attention to urban development.
topics.share_angle: Highlight futuristic technologies or policies showcased at the conference.

topics.chinese_topic: 将任英国新首相的伯纳姆是谁
topics.official_english: Who Is Burnham, the Incoming UK Prime Minister?
topics.why_hot: International political leadership changes spark curiosity about foreign leaders.
topics.share_angle: Provide a profile of Burnham and his policy positions.

topics.chinese_topic: 一文看懂国家网络身份认证使用场景
topics.official_english: Understanding National Online Identity Authentication: Use Cases Explained
topics.why_hot: Digital identity systems affect privacy and convenience, a hot topic in tech policy.
topics.share_angle: Break down how the system works and what it means for users.

topics.chinese_topic: 北京举报“幽灵外卖”最高奖励100万
topics.official_english: Beijing Offers Up to 1 Million Yuan Reward for Reporting 'Ghost' Food Delivery Outlets
topics.why_hot: Food safety and regulatory crackdowns resonate with public health concerns.
topics.share_angle: Explain what 'ghost kitchens' are and how the reward system aims to improve safety.

topics.chinese_topic: 气象台不敢报40℃？真相来了
topics.official_english: Are Weather Stations Afraid to Report 40°C? The Truth Revealed
topics.why_hot: Extreme heat and public trust in official data are timely concerns.
topics.share_angle: Clarify the science behind temperature reporting and address misconceptions.

topics.chinese_topic: 西班牙21世纪四进决赛全夺冠
topics.official_english: Spain Wins All Four Finals in the 21st Century
topics.why_hot: Sports achievements inspire national pride and global interest.
